---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
###############################################################################
##  Gallus gallus ID‑mapping helper for ExpressAnalyst / iDEP / DAVID
##  (c) 2025 Galen O’Shea‑Stone
##  Updated 2025‑06‑18 – dual rescue (Ensembl v104 + g:Profiler w/ chunking)
###############################################################################

## 1  PACKAGES ---------------------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

required_pkgs <- c("biomaRt", "dplyr", "readr", "stringr", "tidyr")
for (pkg in required_pkgs) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE)
}

library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)

## 2  USER INPUT -------------------------------------------------------------
infile  <- "ExpAnalyst_format.csv"        # raw counts
outfile_counts <- "counts_entrez.csv"
outfile_map    <- "id_map_table.csv"

## 3  READ & PRE‑CLEAN --------------------------------------------------------
message("Reading count matrix …")
counts_raw <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)
id_col <- colnames(counts_raw)[1]

counts <- counts_raw %>%
  filter(!str_detect(.data[[id_col]], "^(ERCC|__)")) %>%
  mutate({{id_col}} := str_remove(.data[[id_col]], "\\.\\d+$"),
         {{id_col}} := str_replace(.data[[id_col]], "^ENSGALT(\\d{9})$", "ENSGALG\\1"))

## 4  CONNECT TO CURRENT Ensembl --------------------------------------------
message("Connecting to Ensembl …")
mart <- tryCatch(
  useEnsembl("genes", dataset = "ggallus_gene_ensembl", mirror = "useast"),
  error = function(e) {
    message("useast mirror unavailable (", e$message, "). Falling back to default server …")
    useEnsembl("genes", dataset = "ggallus_gene_ensembl")
  }
)

## 5  PRIMARY MAPPING ---------------------------------------------------------
message("Querying mapping for ", nrow(counts), " unique IDs …")
map_tbl <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "entrezgene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                 filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
                 values     = counts[[id_col]],
                 mart       = mart) %>%
  rename(!!id_col := ensembl_gene_id,
         ENTREZ_ID = entrezgene_id,
         GENE_SYM  = external_gene_name) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
  distinct()

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5b  RESCUE via Ensembl 104 --------------------------------------------------
unmapped <- setdiff(counts[[id_col]], map_tbl[[id_col]])
if (length(unmapped)) {
  legacy_mart <- useEnsembl("genes", dataset = "ggallus_gene_ensembl", version = 104)
  legacy_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "entrezgene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                      filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
                      values     = unmapped,
                      mart       = legacy_mart) %>%
    rename(!!id_col := ensembl_gene_id,
           ENTREZ_ID = entrezgene_id,
           GENE_SYM  = external_gene_name) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
    distinct()

  if (nrow(legacy_map)) {
    map_tbl <- bind_rows(map_tbl, legacy_map) %>% distinct()
    message("Rescued ", nrow(legacy_map), " IDs from Ensembl v104")
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5c  RESCUE via g:Profiler (chunked + retries) ------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("gprofiler2", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("gprofiler2")
library(gprofiler2)

still_unmapped <- setdiff(counts[[id_col]], map_tbl[[id_col]])
if (length(still_unmapped)) {
  ## --- helper: safe gconvert with 3‑attempt retry ---------------------------
  safe_convert <- function(id_vec) {
    attempt <- 1
    while (attempt <= 3) {
      res <- tryCatch({
        gconvert(query = id_vec, organism = "ggallus",
                 target = c("ENTREZGENE_ACC", "SYMBOL"),
                 mthreshold = Inf, filter_na = TRUE)
      }, error = function(e) e)
      if (!inherits(res, "error")) return(res)
      message("g:Profiler attempt ", attempt, " failed (", length(id_vec), " IDs). Retrying …")
      Sys.sleep(2 ^ attempt)            # exponential back‑off: 2, 4 seconds
      attempt <- attempt + 1
    }
    message("g:Profiler gave up after 3 attempts for chunk of ", length(id_vec), " IDs")
    NULL
  }

  ## --- split into ≤1 000‑ID chunks ----------------------------------------
  chunk_vec <- split(still_unmapped, ceiling(seq_along(still_unmapped) / 1000))
  gp_hits   <- purrr::map(chunk_vec, safe_convert) |> purrr::compact()

  if (length(gp_hits)) {
    gp_tbl <- bind_rows(gp_hits) %>%
      transmute(!!id_col := input,
                ENTREZ_ID = as.character(target),
                GENE_SYM  = name)
    map_tbl <- bind_rows(map_tbl, gp_tbl) %>% distinct()
    message("g:Profiler rescued ", nrow(gp_tbl), " additional IDs after retries")
  } else {
    message("g:Profiler rescue returned 0 usable matches (all chunks failed)")
  }
} else {
  message("No IDs left for g:Profiler rescue")
}

## 6  MERGE & COLLAPSE -------------------------------------------------------  MERGE & COLLAPSE -------------------------------------------------------
counts_mapped <- left_join(counts, map_tbl, by = id_col) %>% relocate(ENTREZ_ID, .before = 1)

n_total  <- nrow(counts)
n_mapped <- sum(!is.na(counts_mapped$ENTREZ_ID))
message("Mapped ", n_mapped, " / ", n_total, " rows (", round(n_mapped/n_total*100,1), " %).")

counts_ok <- counts_mapped %>% filter(!is.na(ENTREZ_ID)) %>%
  group_by(ENTREZ_ID) %>% summarise(across(where(is.numeric), sum), .groups = "drop")

## 7  WRITE OUTPUTS ----------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(counts_ok %>% select(ENTREZ_ID, where(is.numeric)), outfile_counts)
write_csv(map_tbl, outfile_map)

## 6b  OPTIONAL ANNOTATIONS --------------------------------------------------
write_csv(counts_mapped %>% relocate(ENTREZ_ID, GENE_SYM, .before = 1), "counts_annotated_rows.csv")
lookup <- map_tbl %>% filter(!is.na(GENE_SYM) & GENE_SYM != "") %>% distinct(ENTREZ_ID, GENE_SYM) %>% group_by(ENTREZ_ID) %>% slice_head(n = 1)
write_csv(counts_ok %>% left_join(lookup, by = "ENTREZ_ID") %>% relocate(GENE_SYM, .after = ENTREZ_ID), "counts_entrez_symbol.csv")

## EXTRA – symbols-only table for ExpressAnalyst  ----------------------------
outfile_symbol <- "counts_symbol.csv"

counts_symbol <- counts_ok %>%                      # after collapse
  left_join(lookup, by = "ENTREZ_ID") %>%           # lookup from Step 6b
  filter(!is.na(GENE_SYM) & GENE_SYM != "") %>%
  select(NAME = GENE_SYM, where(is.numeric))        # rename 1st col

write_csv(counts_symbol, outfile_symbol)
message("Wrote symbols-only counts → ", outfile_symbol)


## 6c  SUMMARY ---------------------------------------------------------------
lib_sizes <- colSums(counts_ok %>% select(where(is.numeric)))
num_samples <- length(lib_sizes)

mean_lib   <- if (num_samples) round(mean(lib_sizes), 1) else NA
median_lib <- if (num_samples) median(lib_sizes)         else NA
min_lib    <- if (num_samples) min(lib_sizes)            else NA
max_lib    <- if (num_samples) max(lib_sizes)            else NA

summary_tbl <- tibble(
  Metric = c("Timestamp", "Rows input", "Rows mapped", "Rows unmapped", "Unique Entrez", "Samples", "Mean lib", "Median lib", "Min lib", "Max lib"),
  Value  = c(format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
             n_total,
             n_mapped,
             n_total - n_mapped,
             nrow(counts_ok),
             num_samples,
             mean_lib,
             median_lib,
             min_lib,
             max_lib)
)

write_tsv(summary_tbl, "id_mapping_summary.tsv")
print(summary_tbl, n = nrow(summary_tbl))
message("Pipeline complete; outputs ready.")
```
